name: Dr. Seuss Baking Challenge
overview: 9 teams of pastry chefs and cake artists compete for honorary citizenship to the City of Seuss, the key to the city, and $50,000. From The Cat in the Hat, to Green Eggs and Ham, The Lorax, Horton Hears a Who, each episode will bring to life the world of Dr. Seuss in the sweetest way possible.
